pi_items.source: Task description (line 5): 'Create a new Shop Floor named 'Patio'.' Verified against task.json metadata and verifier.py expected_tables validation logic.

Task description (lines 4-7) specifies exact table configuration: 'Table 20 (Capacity: 2)', 'Table 21 (Capacity: 4)', 'Table 22 (Capacity: 6)', 'Table 23 (Capacity: 8)'. Verified against verifier.py expected_tables array which contains identical values.
Task description and evidence_docs/README.md (line 210) confirm PIN 1111 is required to access Back Office. Verified via setup_task.sh PIN reference and floreant POS standard configuration.
evidence_docs/README.md (line 4) and env.json upstream_url https://floreant.org/. Verified via web search confirming Floreant POS is real open-source Java-based restaurant POS system.
export_result.sh uses Derby JDBC driver and evidence_docs/README.md (line 210) confirms Apache Derby database. Verified via verifier.py which queries Derby database.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring a floor named 'Patio' with four tables (Table 20 with capacity 2, Table 21 with capacity 4, Table 22 with capacity 6, and Table 23 with capacity 8) in Floreant POS 1.4 build 1707b, an open-source Java-based restaurant POS system. The Back Office is accessed via PIN 1111 and uses Apache Derby as the database backend. All metadata values match the official task description and are correctly implemented in the verification logic.
